identity.name: E1
anti_patterns: Purple/Teal for CTA (Use Electric Green or White instead)

rules: Overlines MUST be Uppercase + tracking-[0.2em] + text-xs
Line height: leading-none for headers, leading-relaxed for body
Do not use bold for everything. Use font-light for large display text.

usage.hero_bg: Deep Void Black (#050505) with subtle purple radial glow
usage.cta_primary: White text on Primary Purple bg, OR Black text on Electric Green bg (for contrast)

spacing.container_padding: p-6 or p-8 for bordered containers

grid_system.dashboard: Mode B: The Control Room Grid (Dense)

cta_section.style: Minimalist, centered but with massive scale

images.description: Abstract network nodes for background or hero visual
AI Brain concept for 'Train in Browser' feature
Dark server room for 'Export Code' or infrastructure feature

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all
You MUST NOT center align the app container
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute
instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the Landing Page at '/' using the design system above. Use the existing 'Manrope' and 'IBM Plex Sans' fonts. Ensure the 'Start Building' CTA links to '/builder'. The design should feel like a 'Control Room' for AI - dark, precise, and powerful. Use the provided image URLs for feature cards where appropriate, or use CSS-based abstract visuals (preferred for this technical audience).
